---
title: "SEB Skills chapter for students"
description: "Un capitolo in italiano per l'approfondimento e lo studio delle SEB skills."
date: 2026-03-12
Method: [chapter]
categories: [SEB]
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=https://feracotommaso.github.io/Personality-and-individual-differences/chapters/personalitySkills.html">
---

This post redirects to the external page.

[Open the page directly](https://feracotommaso.github.io/Personality-and-individual-differences/chapters/personalitySkills.html)
